title: Panduan Bertahan Hidup Karyawan Mapan
theme: Menemukan kegilaan yang menghibur dalam rutinitas kerja yang monoton dan tuntutan manajemen yang tidak masuk akal.

cover.prompt: A stark, yet subtly warm-lit corporate cubicle environment. The main focus is a computer monitor screen, displaying an 'URGENT' email subject line in a prominent, glowing font. The surrounding desk holds stacks of paperwork and a few minimalist office objects, all rendered with a sense of quiet routine. Soft, natural light from an unseen window bathes a portion of the scene, creating gentle contrasts. The overall composition suggests a feeling of structured existence with a looming, unexpected element, focusing on the atmosphere of a typical workday interrupted.
cover.style: Cinematic photography, shallow depth of field, warm color grading

meta.plan_summary: A cynical veteran employee navigates absurd corporate policies, such as mandatory 'mood-boosting desk ornaments' and 'happiness workshops', finding unique, passive-aggressive ways to survive and subtly inspire colleagues in a humorously monotonous work environment. The narrative culminates in an ironic act of 'participation' during a mandatory happiness workshop, leading to a bitter satisfaction and a unique way of coping.
meta.target_emotion: Cynical amusement, relatable frustration, dark humor, subtle inspiration
